critical_issues.title: CachePublicPages middleware produces no HITs — only landing pages cached
critical_issues.evidence: All category/product/brand pages return no-cache, private headers

critical_issues.title: Redis completely unused — cache stored in filesystem
Every page sets anonymous session cookies — prevents CDN caching
critical_issues.evidence: XSRF-TOKEN + neogiga_session cookies on all responses including homepage

critical_issues.title: No product/price/stock cache invalidation
critical_issues.evidence: Product, MarketplaceProductPrice, InventoryStock models have no booted() cache busting

critical_issues.title: No database backups exist on production

high_priority_issues.title: PostgreSQL DISTINCT ON ORDER BY mismatch in production logs
high_priority_issues.evidence: 59 ERROR entries in laravel.log including SQLSTATE[42P10]

high_priority_issues.title: No gzip/brotli compression — 70KB pages transferred uncompressed
high_priority_issues.evidence: No Content-Encoding header on any response

high_priority_issues.title: Image derivatives generated but never served to frontend
high_priority_issues.evidence: WebP/AVIF at 4 sizes generated by ElecforestMediaImporter but publicUrl() returns original only

high_priority_issues.title: CPU load at 15.86 — PostgreSQL dominant
high_priority_issues.evidence: 7+ concurrent PostgreSQL SELECT processes consuming 15-17% memory each

high_priority_issues.title: Category/product pages not cached — every visit hits backend
high_priority_issues.evidence: no-cache, private on all /en/categories/* and /en/products/* routes

high_priority_issues.title: No CDN configured — no Cloudflare, no edge caching
high_priority_issues.evidence: No CF-Cache-Status, Age, or CDN-Cache-Control headers present

high_priority_issues.title: No cache monitoring or hit-rate tracking
high_priority_issues.evidence: Redis INFO shows 0 hits/misses; no application-level cache metrics

completed_features: Category descendant caching (BFS + cached parent→child map)
Category page sort/pagination/stock filter (in branch, not deployed)
Brand logos admin page (in branch, not deployed)
SEO sitemap caching with version-bump invalidation
partially_completed_features: CachePublicPages middleware exists but only landing pages show cache headers
Category descendant IDs cached but still does one full-table scan to build map
Image optimization — derivatives generated but not served via srcset/picture
missing_features: Redis as cache store (file used instead)
Regional cache isolation in page cache keys

test_summary.failure_cause: All 20 failures are pre-existing: SQLite missing 'roles' table / BOM import assertions

api_performance.note: No API endpoints tested in this audit scope — see API audit for details

production_errors: SQLSTATE[42P10] DISTINCT ON / ORDER BY mismatch

recommended_next_actions: Set up automated PostgreSQL backups immediately
Switch CACHE_STORE and SESSION_DRIVER to redis
Register CachePublicPages middleware with auth check and domain-aware keys
Add model boot events for Product, MarketplaceProductPrice, InventoryStock
Fix PostgreSQL DISTINCT ON ordering bug
Fix anonymous session creation on public pages
Deploy current branch changes to production
Add composite database indexes for category listing
Implement responsive images with srcset using existing derivatives
